name: matthew-a-carr/review-spec
description: Cross-artefact consistency and quality review of an approved or draft SPEC. Use when the user says "review SPEC-NNN," before `implement-spec` runs, or by `draft-spec` / `revise-spec` before opening or updating a spec PR. Checks the SPEC against the constitution, ADRs, parent epic (if any), and tech debt register. Read-only — produces a structured report, never edits files.
